title: rubus glandulosus var. infestus
intro: Rubus glandulosus var. infestus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or the Himalayan strawberry, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus glandulosus var. infestus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
